changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.16
changeSet.comment: Create chash_index table mirroring SQLite ChashIndex schema with tenant_id
changeSet.rollback: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS nexus.chash_index CASCADE

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.16
changeSet.comment: Enable and force RLS; create tenant isolation policy

changeSet.author: nexus-gmiaf.16
changeSet.comment: Grant table privileges to nexus_svc role. Idempotent: IF EXISTS guard makes it safe even if the role does not exist yet.
